6:
WITH cust_cons AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID,
         c.Segment,
         SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
  GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_per_seg AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
  FROM cust_cons
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT min_total FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT min_total FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM,
  (SELECT min_total FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT min_total FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM,
  (SELECT min_total FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT min_total FROM min_per_seg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013 AS pct_increase
    FROM (
        SELECT
            Segment,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
        FROM (
            SELECT
                c.Segment,
                substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
                SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth y
            JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
              AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
              AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
            GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date, 1, 4)
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
) 
WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013 AS pct_increase
    FROM (
        SELECT
            Segment,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
        FROM (
            SELECT
                c.Segment,
                substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
                SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
            FROM yearmonth y
            JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
              AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
              AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
            GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date, 1, 4)
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
) 
WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
  CAST(((last_sec - champ_sec) / last_sec) * 100 AS REAL) AS faster_percentage
FROM (
  SELECT
    (substr(champion_time,1,2)*3600.0 + substr(champion_time,4,2)*60.0 + substr(champion_time,7,2) + substr(champion_time,10,3)/1000.0) AS champ_sec,
    (substr(last_time,1,2)*3600.0 + substr(last_time,4,2)*60.0 + substr(last_time,7,2) + substr(last_time,10,3)/1000.0) AS last_sec
  FROM (
    SELECT
      MAX(CASE WHEN r.position = 1 THEN r.time END) AS champion_time,
      MAX(CASE WHEN r.position = (
            SELECT MAX(position)
            FROM results
            WHERE raceId = r.raceId AND time IS NOT NULL
          ) THEN r.time END) AS last_time
    FROM results r
    JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
    WHERE ra.year = 2008
      AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
      AND r.time IS NOT NULL
  )
);	----- bird -----	formula_1
